366:12.notes: Treat the named-storm formation of Jeanne as a one-off Caribbean hurricane-basin event in the immediate post-prediction window.

464:5.notes: Treat a named-country cyclone catastrophe on the specified day as a one-off event over the immediate post-prediction window.

448:8.notes: Treat destruction of a named town by a tornado as a one-off location-specific event across the modern tornado record.

688:6.notes: Treat a catastrophic hurricane striking Texas in the immediate post-prediction days as a one-off regional storm event.

574:7.notes: Treat a devastating regional storm catastrophe striking Sardinia in the immediate post-prediction window as a one-off event.

863:6.notes: Treat a country-scale storm catastrophe striking Libya in the immediate post-prediction days as a one-off regional event.
